creator: michiel@boland.org
text:
mathopd maintainer here.
I'm a bit rusty with all of this, so forgive me if I go about this the wrong way.
I did a quick build of the mathopd port with WITH_PIE=yes on a -CURRENT snapshot and did not see anything wrong.
Looking at the build log, it appears that the binaries are linked with "-pie".
Then should not the source files be compiled with "-fPIE" also?
